daily_summary.note: Bot offline. Zero live activity on 2026-06-25.

anomalies.description: Bot has been offline for 86 consecutive days. No live trades, no revenue, no rule validation. 14 graduated rules untested in production. 5 A/B gates (3 via LLM rules + 2 code changes) inactive.
anomalies.recommendation: cd /home/user/WAGMI/bot && python run.py paper -- start paper trading immediately

anomalies.description: avg_loss=$306.96 vs avg_win=$147.07 (ratio=0.479). Kelly recent=-0.265. Bot cannot be profitable at current R:R without 68%+ WR (actual=57%). This is the primary structural defect.
anomalies.recommendation: DECIDE: Option A (global atr_mult_sl 1.5->1.8, breakeven WR drops to 62%) OR Option B (HYPE-specific 2.0->2.3). No more deferrals -- 27 flags is 27 runs of structural bleeding.

anomalies.description: ESCALATED from HIGH. Confidence >=90% setups: WR=64.1%, EV=+$101.92/trade, n=39. Boost +5 proposed (conf=72%, auto-threshold=75%). 16 consecutive runs without action = ~$1,630.72 missed EV. Only blocker: human approval (72% vs 75% threshold).
anomalies.recommendation: Approve CONF_90PLUS_BOOST in graduated_rules.json: action=boost, conditions={confidence_min: 90}, adjustment=5.0, gate_percentage=20. Low risk -- A/B gate means only 20% of trades see the boost.

anomalies.description: Code fix applied at run126 but unverifiable until bot restarts. HoldTimeRuleManager uses corrupted data (0 or negative duration on all 965 trades). 19 consecutive flags.
anomalies.recommendation: Auto-verify at first live trade close post-restart. No action needed now -- fix is in code.

anomalies.description: HYPE SHORT >=75% conf triggers both veto (restored_hype_short_highconf_veto_v1, conf=0.71) AND size cap (restored_hype_sizing_cap_v1, conf=0.92). Veto rule has lowest confidence of all 14 active rules yet most aggressive action. May suppress valid HYPE SHORT signals.
anomalies.recommendation: Monitor first 20 HYPE SHORT >=75% signals live. If veto rate >80%, reduce to size_cap only.

anomalies.description: 20d WR=65.8%/+$7,053 vs 100d WR=44.5%/-$8,173. Confidence-WR relationship inverts: 100d shows 40% WR at 80-90% conf; 20d shows 82% WR at same band. Rules calibrated on 100d data may penalize recent-period winners.
anomalies.recommendation: After bot restart, weight rules toward recent 20-30d data. Flag if confidence-WR inversion persists after 50 live trades.

avoid: all trades in night session (00-06 UTC)
tomorrows_focus.key_action: Start bot in paper mode, let first 20 trades calibrate live feedback systems
